key_policies.revenue_recognition: Revenue from franchise operations recognized over term of franchise agreement. Initial franchise fees recognized when performance obligation satisfied (store opening). Royalties recognized as earned. Gift card breakage recognized proportionally.
key_policies.depreciation: PP&E depreciated on straight-line basis over useful lives. Leasehold improvements over shorter of lease term or useful life.
key_policies.impairment: Goodwill tested annually and when triggering events occur. Intangible assets with indefinite lives (trademarks) tested annually. FY2024: $37.5M impairment of intangibles/goodwill + $6.2M PP&E + $649k ROU = $44.3M total. FY2020: $62.1M impairment.
key_policies.lease_accounting: ASC 842 adopted. Operating leases recognized as ROU assets and lease liabilities. FY2024: ROU assets $190.4M, lease liabilities $156.1M (long-term) + $38.3M (current).
key_policies.income_taxes: Deferred tax assets/liabilities recognized. FY2024: deferred income taxes $101M (liability). Tax provision: current $9.9M, deferred recovery $(9.2M).

related_party_structure.observation: Complex intercompany structure. $708M loan from common-control entity is the largest single liability. $204M receivable from ultimate parent is the largest non-intangible asset. Net intercompany position: owes $708M, is owed $204M.

subsequent_events: Board approved financial statements January 31, 2025. PwC audit report dated January 31, 2025.
advertising_fund: Brand Marketing Fund administered by Murphy's Marketing Services, Inc. (affiliate). FY2024 deficit of $(7.5M). Franchisor has no fiduciary duty. Unaudited.
